---
title: "Week 5 Class Note"
subtitle: "IBM 3202"
author: "Alexandria Jaimes"
date: today
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 3
    toc-location: right-body
    number-sections: true
    code-line-numbers: true
    code-fold: false
    code-link: true
    embed-resources: true
    df-print: paged
editor: visual 
execute:
  freeze: auto
  warning: false
  error: true
---

# Assigment Deadline Adjustment
